ddls:
CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "geolocation" TEXT /* Geolocation of the location (e.g., latitude, longitude) */,
  "water_type" TEXT /* Type of water at the location (e.g., river, lake, coastal) */,
  "location_type" TEXT /* Type of location (e.g., river, lake, coastal) */,
  "location_description" TEXT /* Description of the location */,
  "sampling_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of sampling at the location */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the location was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the location was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "samples" (
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sample */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the location where the sample was taken */,
  "sample_date" TEXT /* Date the sample was taken */,
  "sample_type" TEXT /* Type of sample (e.g., surface water, groundwater) */,
  "sample_method" TEXT /* Method used to collect the sample (e.g., grab sample, composite sample) */,
  "sample_depth" REAL /* Depth of the water at the time of sampling */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions at the time of sampling */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the water quality analysis (e.g., ND, numeric value) */,
  "samples_taken" INTEGER /* Number of samples taken at the location */,
  "detections" INTEGER /* Number of detections of contaminants or pollutants */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the sample was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the sample was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sample_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_samples_sample_type FOREIGN KEY ("sample_type") REFERENCES sample_types ("sample_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_samples_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sample_types" (
  "sample_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sample type */,
  "sample_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the sample type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sample type */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the sample type was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the sample type was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sample_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "parameters" (
  "parameter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each parameter */,
  "parameter_name" TEXT /* Name of the parameter */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the parameter */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the parameter */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the parameter was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the parameter was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("parameter_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each result */,
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sample the result belongs to */,
  "parameter_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parameter measured */,
  "result_value" REAL /* Value of the result */,
  "result_status" TEXT /* Status of the result (e.g., valid, invalid, pending) */,
  "result_description" TEXT /* Description of the result */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the result was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the result was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_results_sample_id FOREIGN KEY ("sample_id") REFERENCES samples ("sample_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_results_parameter_id FOREIGN KEY ("parameter_id") REFERENCES parameters ("parameter_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "detections" (
  "detection_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each detection */,
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sample the detection belongs to */,
  "parameter_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parameter measured */,
  "detection_value" REAL /* Value of the detection */,
  "detection_status" TEXT /* Status of the detection (e.g., detected, not detected) */,
  "detection_description" TEXT /* Description of the detection */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the detection was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the detection was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("detection_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_detections_parameter_id FOREIGN KEY ("parameter_id") REFERENCES parameters ("parameter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_detections_sample_id FOREIGN KEY ("sample_id") REFERENCES samples ("sample_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Description of the user's role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sample being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the sample */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the sample was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_description" TEXT /* Description of the access event */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access event was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access event was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_sample_id FOREIGN KEY ("sample_id") REFERENCES samples ("sample_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sample_locations" (
  "sample_location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sample location */,
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sample the location belongs to */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the location */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the sample location was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the sample location was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sample_location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sample_locations_sample_id FOREIGN KEY ("sample_id") REFERENCES samples ("sample_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "years" (
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each year */,
  "year_name" TEXT /* Year the sample was taken */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the year was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the year was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ranges" (
  "range_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each range */,
  "parameter_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parameter the range belongs to */,
  "min_value" REAL /* Minimum value of the range */,
  "max_value" REAL /* Maximum value of the range */,
  "range_description" TEXT /* Description of the range */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the range was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the range was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("range_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ranges_parameter_id FOREIGN KEY ("parameter_id") REFERENCES parameters ("parameter_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sampling_events" (
  "sampling_event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sampling event */,
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sample collected during the event */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location where the sample was collected */,
  "sampling_date" TEXT /* Date of the sampling event */,
  "sampling_time" TEXT /* Time of the sampling event */,
  "personnel_involved" TEXT /* Personnel involved in the sampling event */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the sampling event was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the sampling event was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sampling_event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sampling_events_sample_id FOREIGN KEY ("sample_id") REFERENCES samples ("sample_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sampling_events_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sampling_personnel" (
  "personnel_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each personnel */,
  "personnel_name" TEXT /* Name of the personnel */,
  "personnel_role" TEXT /* Role of the personnel (e.g., sampler, analyst) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the personnel was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the personnel was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("personnel_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sample_shipping" (
  "shipping_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each shipping event */,
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sample being shipped */,
  "shipping_date" TEXT /* Date of shipping */,
  "shipping_method" TEXT /* Method of shipping (e.g., courier, mail) */,
  "receiver" TEXT /* Name of the receiver */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the shipping event was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the shipping event was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("shipping_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sample_shipping_sample_id FOREIGN KEY ("sample_id") REFERENCES samples ("sample_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "laboratory_results" (
  "laboratory_result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each laboratory result */,
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sample analyzed */,
  "parameter_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parameter measured */,
  "result_value" REAL /* Value of the result */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the laboratory result was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the laboratory result was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("laboratory_result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_laboratory_results_parameter_id FOREIGN KEY ("parameter_id") REFERENCES parameters ("parameter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_laboratory_results_sample_id FOREIGN KEY ("sample_id") REFERENCES samples ("sample_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_validation" (
  "validation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each validation event */,
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sample being validated */,
  "parameter_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parameter being validated */,
  "validation_result" TEXT /* Result of the validation (e.g., valid, invalid) */,
  "validation_date" TEXT /* Date of validation */,
  "validator" TEXT /* Name of the validator */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the validation event was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the validation event was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("validation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_validation_parameter_id FOREIGN KEY ("parameter_id") REFERENCES parameters ("parameter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_validation_sample_id FOREIGN KEY ("sample_id") REFERENCES samples ("sample_id")
)
